name: create-release-skill
description: Create tailored release skills for any project type. Reverse-engineers the project, determines versioning, and generates a release skill with changelog, semver, and git integration.

node.description: Node.js runtime (required for npx and HappySkills CLI)

install.linux: curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_lts.x | sudo -E bash - && sudo apt install -y nodejs
